reasoning: The timeframe left in 2025 is only 10 days (from December 21 to December 31). Russia is actively engaged in Ukraine, and Finland is a full NATO member, meaning any military offensive would trigger Article 5 and a broader conflict with NATO. Such an invasion would require massive logistical preparation and troop buildup on the border, which would be widely reported by global media and intelligence agencies long before the invasion began. No such buildup or intention has been reported, and Polymarket previously traded this at 0.00. The chance of a surprise invasion before the end of the year is practically zero.
